name: Apfelstrudel (Apple Strudel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix apples with raisins, lemon rind, sugar, cinnamon, and almonds. Set aside.
2. Place one fillo leaf on a kitchen towel and brush with melted butter.
3. Place a second leaf on top and brush with butter again. Repeat until 5 leaves have been used, using about 1/2 cup of butter.
4. Cook and stir bread crumbs with 1/4 cup of butter until lightly browned. Sprinkle 3/4 cup crumbs on the layered fillo leaves.
5. Mound half of the filling in a 3-inch strip along the narrow end of the fillo, leaving a 2-inch border.
6. Lift the towel and use it to roll the leaves into a jelly-roll formation.
7. Brush the top of the strudel with butter and sprinkle with 2 tablespoons of crumbs.
8. Repeat the entire procedure for the second strudel.
9. Bake the strudels at 400°F for 20 to 25 minutes, until browned. Makes 2 strudels, serving 6 to 8 each.
